language.error.not_found: <prefix> <color:#FF4444>Language '<lang>' not found. Use /language list to see available languages.</color>
error.player_only: <prefix> <color:#FF4444>This command can only be used by players.</color>
error.no_permission: <prefix> <color:#FF4444>You don't have permission to use this.</color>
tpa.sent.tpahere: <prefix> <color:#FFB300>Request sent to <color:#FFFFFF><player></color> to teleport to you. Expires in <color:#66AAFF><seconds>s</color></color>
tpa.received.tpa:
<prefix> <color:#FFFFFF><player></color> <color:#FFB300>wants to teleport to you.</color>
<color:#AAAAAA>Type <click:run_command:/tpaccept><color:#66AAFF>/tpaccept</color></click> to accept or <click:run_command:/tpdeny><color:#FF4444>/tpdeny</color></click> to deny.</color>
tpa.received.tpahere:
<prefix> <color:#FFFFFF><player></color> <color:#FFB300>wants you to teleport to them.</color>
<color:#AAAAAA>Type <click:run_command:/tpaccept><color:#66AAFF>/tpaccept</color></click> to accept or <click:run_command:/tpdeny><color:#FF4444>/tpdeny</color></click> to deny.</color>
tpa.toggle.disabled: <prefix> <color:#FF4444>TPA requests disabled. You will not receive requests.</color>
tpa.error.max_outgoing: <prefix> <color:#FF4444>You have too many outgoing requests pending.</color>
